member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.DdxCallbackServer
member.summary:
HTTP callback listener that handles DDX callback events.
All DDX callback servers MUST implement at least application_ping. DDX sends application_ping BEFORE the end user can approve the registration, to confirm the callback server is reachable.
Signature validation (spec v1.0): For signed callbacks (all except application_ping), validate as follows: 1. Take only: ddx_app_key, ddx_nonce, ddx_signature_method, ddx_timestamp, ddx_version — sorted alphabetically. 2. Concatenate as raw key+value pairs (no separators). 3. Append privateKey + eventName. 4. Hash with SHA256 or MD5 (plain, not HMAC). 5. Compare result to the supplied ddx_signature.
Note: application_ping carries NO authentication (per DDX spec).
Usage: var server = new DdxCallbackServer(config, port: 7777); server.Start(); // ... server.Stop();

member.name: F:DdxDentalClient.DdxCallbackServer.SignatureKeys
member.summary: Keys included in callback signature validation (spec-defined set).

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxCallbackServer.ValidateSignature(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary:
Validates a signed callback event per DDX auth spec v1.0.
Base string = concat of sorted (ddx_app_key, ddx_nonce, ddx_signature_method, ddx_timestamp, ddx_version) raw key+value pairs + privateKey + eventName
Then hash with SHA256 or MD5 and compare to ddx_signature.

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxCallbackServer.OnApplicationPing
member.summary: DDX sends application_ping (no auth) before the end user can complete registration. Must respond with .

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient
member.summary:
Client for the DDX Dental remote application API.
Authentication (DDX auth spec v1.0): All signed API calls include these query parameters: ddx_app_key – your public key ddx_signature_method – "SHA256" or "MD5" ddx_timestamp – ISO 8601 date/time string ddx_nonce – random unique string per request ddx_version – "1.0" ddx_signature – generated hash (see below)
Signing algorithm: 1. Sort all request params (excl. ddx_signature) alphabetically by key. 2. Concatenate as raw key+value pairs with NO separators: key1value1key2value2... 3. Append the private key, then the API method name (last URL path segment). 4. Hash the entire string with SHA256 or MD5 (plain hash, NOT HMAC). 5. Hex-encode the result (lower-case).

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GetRegistrationUrl(System.String,System.String,System.String[],System.String,System.String[])
member.summary:
Builds the browser URL for application_register. The DDX user must open this in a browser, authenticate, and approve. After approval DDX will display the public and private keys.
Recommended scopes for a read-only lab integration: scopes: ["lab.case.read", "lab.account.read"]
Available scopes include: lab.case.read, lab.case.write, lab.case.*, lab.account.read, lab.account.write, lab.meta.read, is_authoritative, etc.
lab.case.read – required for GetCasesAsync / GetCaseInfoAsync lab.account.read – required for GetAccountAsync
IMPORTANT: If you have already registered without the required scopes, you must re-register (new keys will be issued) to gain access.

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GetApplicationInfoAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calls application_get_info to validate keys and retrieve application details. Automatically populates from the response. Throws on API-level errors.

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GetAccountAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Retrieves the dental practice account details (account_get).
The two most commonly needed fields are: – practice name . – primary contact email
Scope required: lab.account.read Endpoint: https://[LabId].[DDX]/service/default/account_get
member.param: The dental practice's identifier. Obtain it from or .

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GetCasesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Retrieves a list of open lab cases (cases_get). Useful for discovering the practice_id of a case before calling .
Endpoint: https://[LabId].[DDX]/service/cases/cases_get

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GetCaseInfoAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Retrieves a specific DDX lab case by case ID.
Endpoint: https://[LabId].[DDX]/service/cases/case_get
Parameters sent: ID = your lab's identifier (subdomain AND query param) id = the case identifier practice_id = the dental practice's identifier
If you do not know the practice_id, call first, or use which does this automatically.
member.param: The dental practice's ID — the practice that sent you this case. This is NOT your lab ID. Find it via or .

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GetCaseInfoByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific DDX lab case by searching the case list for its practice_id automatically. Convenience wrapper around + .

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.FindPracticeIdForCaseAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Calls cases_get to find the practice_id associated with a given case ID. Throws if the case is not found.

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GenerateSignature(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary:
DDX signature algorithm (spec v1.0):
base = concat of sorted key+value pairs (raw, no separators) + privateKey + methodName ← API method or callback event name
signature = SHA256(base) or MD5(base) — plain hash, not HMAC
Example (from spec): params sorted → ddx_app_key{key}ddx_nonce705...formatXML + privateKey + "application_get_info" → SHA256 → 64ce0a0080da2b5bd1b15d336e05feae...

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.GetJsonAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a GET request and returns the raw body, asserting it is JSON. Reserved for any future DDX endpoints that may genuinely return JSON. All current DDX endpoints (including case_get/cases_get) are on the XML path via — do not use this for case calls.

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.TryThrowDdxJsonError(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to parse a DDX JSON error and throw a . DDX JSON error format: {"error":"string","error_description":"string"}

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.TryThrowDdxError(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to parse a DDX error response and throw a . DDX error XML format: <response> <error>6</error> <error_message>Requested API call does not exist</error_message> <error_details/> </response>

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxClient.ParseResponse``1(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialises XML into T. Throws with the inner exception message on failure so the caller can see exactly which element caused the problem.

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.DdxApiException
member.summary: Represents a DDX API-level error.

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.DdxApiException.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a DDX API-level error.

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.DdxConfig
member.summary: Configuration for the DDX Dental remote application. Public and private keys are obtained after completing the browser-based application_register flow.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.DdxConfig.DdxHost
member.summary: DDX base hostname, e.g. "ddxdental.com" or "www.ddxdental.com". Used as-is for application_get_info. For case_get the library strips any leading "www." and prepends the LabId as subdomain, e.g. "804598.ddxdental.com".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.DdxConfig.LabId
member.summary:
YOUR lab's numeric identifier (used as the subdomain and as the required "ID" query parameter for case API calls).
This is automatically populated from ApplicationInfoResponse.ParentId after a successful call to GetApplicationInfoAsync().
IMPORTANT: This is NOT the dental practice's ID. The dental practice ID must be passed separately to GetCaseInfoAsync().

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.DdxConfig.AppPublicKey
member.summary: Remote application public key (ddx_app_key), provided after registration.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.DdxConfig.AppPrivateKey
member.summary: Remote application private key, provided after registration. Appended to the signature base string during signing — keep this confidential.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.DdxConfig.SignatureMethod
member.summary: Signature method: "SHA256" (default) or "MD5". Should match the callback_signature_method chosen during registration.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.DdxConfig.ApiVersion
member.summary: DDX API version (always "1.0").

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.CasesResponse
member.summary: Wrapper for the XML response returned by cases_get.

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.CaseSummary
member.summary: Lightweight case entry returned by cases_get. Use to retrieve all open cases. The value can then be passed to to fetch the full case detail.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseSummary.DdxId
member.summary: Global DDX case hash identifier.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseSummary.PracticeId
member.summary: The dental practice's ID that sent this case to your lab.

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.CaseInfoResponse
member.summary: Full DDX lab case returned by case_get.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseInfoResponse.Id
member.summary: DDX lab case identifier.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseInfoResponse.PracticeIdRaw
member.summary: Dental practice identifier (the practice that sent this case).

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseInfoResponse.CancelledBy
member.summary: "PRACTICE" or "LAB".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseInfoResponse.Status
member.summary: "OPEN" or "CLOSED".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseInfoResponse.ShippingType
member.summary: "DHL", "UPS", "FDX", "PUR", "USPS", "CAPS", or "OTHER".

member.name: M:DdxDentalClient.CaseInfoResponse.ToString
member.summary: Returns a human-readable summary of the case.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CasePatient.Dob
member.summary: Date of birth (ISO date string, e.g. "1985-06-15").

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CasePatient.Gender
member.summary: "M" or "F".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.ProcedureAttribute.Regions
member.summary: "gingival", "body", or "incisal".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.ProcedureAttribute.MassRaw
member.summary: Material mass in grams (may be null).

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.ProcedureAttribute.PriceRaw
member.summary: Procedure price (may be null).

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseNote.Recipient
member.summary: "PRACTICE" or "LAB".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseNote.Originator
member.summary: "PRACTICE" or "LAB".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.CaseFile.Originator
member.summary: "PRACTICE" or "LAB".

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.AccountInfoResponse
member.summary: Dental practice account returned by account_get. The two most commonly needed fields are (practice name) and ..

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.AccountInfoResponse.Name
member.summary: Practice name (up to 40 characters).

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.AccountInfoResponse.Status
member.summary: "ACTIVE", "PENDING", or "CLOSED".

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.AccountInfoResponse.Email
member.summary: Practice-level email address (separate from the primary contact email).

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.AccountInfoResponse.Primary
member.summary: Primary contact for this practice. Use for the primary contact email.

member.name: T:DdxDentalClient.AccountPrimaryContact
member.summary: Primary contact information returned inside account_get.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.AccountPrimaryContact.Email
member.summary: Primary contact email address.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.ErrorResponse.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric DDX error code, e.g. 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 12.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.ErrorResponse.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Human-readable error description.

member.name: P:DdxDentalClient.ErrorResponse.ErrorDetails
member.summary: Optional additional error detail.
